scripts.install-backend: npm ci --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund || npm install --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.install-frontend: npm ci --prefix frontend --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund || npm install --prefix frontend --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund || npm install --prefix frontend --production=false --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.build: npm run install-backend && npm run install-frontend && npm run build-frontend
